mapper.select:
SELECT vs.* FROM elder_vital_signs vs WHERE vs.del_flag = 0
AND vs.record_time BETWEEN concat(#{data.recordTimeArr[0]},' 00:00:00') AND concat(#{data.recordTimeArr[1]},' 23:59:59')
and vs.checkin_id like concat(concat('%',#{data.checkinId}),'%')
and vs.customer_id = #{data.customerId}
ORDER BY vs.create_time DESC
